title: Building a Model with torch.nn.Sequential
short_description: Compose a regression MLP with nn.Sequential (no subclass) and run inference correctly with eval mode and torch.no_grad. Verified by structure, forward shape, and gradient flow.
learning_objectives: Compose a network from a list of layers with nn.Sequential
Place activations correctly between Linear layers
Reason about layer shapes and parameter counts
Run inference with model.eval() and torch.no_grad()
Know when to reach for Sequential vs subclassing nn.Module
prerequisites: Challenge 3 (A Small Neural Network in PyTorch) or equivalent
